description: Canonical data contract for the personal meta layer.

layers.raw: Immutable source artifacts as originally exported or downloaded.
layers.working: Temporary extracted files and parser intermediates.
layers.normalized: Source-shaped JSONL records mapped by connector or importer.
layers.canonical: Cross-source NDJSON records for artifacts, entities, events, and relationships.
layers.views: App-facing derived records designed for user comprehension.

artifacts.description: Source files or archives used to derive downstream records.

entities.description: Durable nouns such as people, accounts, conversations, channels, tracks, videos, playlists, and documents.

events.description: Time-based actions such as watched_video, searched, sent_message, playlist_track, or viewed_post.

relationships.description: Edges between canonical entities and events.

identity_principles: Preserve provenance on every canonical record.
Separate observed facts from derived inferences.
Treat identity as time-aware rather than static.
Design views for user comprehension, not source fidelity.
